ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "from_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the shipment */,
  "to_location" TEXT /* Destination location of the shipment */,
  "dqf" INTEGER /* Distance quality factor of the shipment */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the shipment in miles */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment (e.g., In Transit, Delivered) */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Total distance of the shipment in miles */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was created */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle used for the shipment */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the shipment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_from_location FOREIGN KEY ("from_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES shipment_statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_to_location FOREIGN KEY ("to_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Warehouse A, Retail Store B) */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., Warehouse, Retail Store, Supplier) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., In Transit, Delivered) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., DQF) */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for assessing quality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the metric evaluates */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the quality metric in the overall assessment */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated shipment */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., Updated Status, Submitted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_logs_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, van) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., Available, In Use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the driver (e.g., Available, On Duty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Manager, Technician) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
